docTitle: Akwụkwọ Nsọ site na Maapụ · Akwụkwọ Nsọ n'otu Mpịpịakwụkwọ
metaDesc: Soro usoro oge nke Agba Ochie, ndụ Jisus, na njem Pọl n'elu ezigbo maapụ — Akwụkwọ Nsọ mere n'ebe ndị dị adị.

s.title: Akwụkwọ Nsọ site na Maapụ
s.verse: “N'ihi na ayi esoghi akukọ-irò nke eji amam-ihe kọ, mb͕e ayi mere ka unu mara ike na ọbibia nke Onye-nwe-ayi Jisus Kraist, ma emere ayi ka ayi buru ndi huru idi-uku nke Onye ahu.” (2 Pita 1:16)
s.purpose: Akwụkwọ Nsọ abụghị akụkọ ifo. Ọ bụ ihe ndekọ banyere ndị mmadụ jere ije n'ebe ndị dị adị, ụbọchị ndị dị adị, na aha ndị dị adị. Soro ụzọ ndị ahụ n'elu maapụ, n'usoro oge — pịa otu ebe, ma ọ bụ pịa ▶ ka i jee ije n'ime ya nzọ n'otu nzọ.
s.ot_h: Site n'okike ruo na mlọghachi na Jerusalem
s.ot_lead: Ọ bụghị otu njem kama mmụba nke akụkọ mgbapụta site n'okike gawa: okike na ọdịda → uju mmiri na Babel → ọkpọ oku (Ebraham) → ala nkwa ahụ → Ọpụpụ → ọzara → imeri ala → alaeze → nkewa → ije mba ọzọ → mlọghachi.
s.je_h: Site na Betlehem ruo na Jerusalem
s.je_lead: Soro ndụ Jisus dị ka Oziọma anọ na-akọ ya, n'usoro — site n'ọmụmụ ya na Betlehem gafee baptism ya na ozi Galili ya, gabiga Sameria, ruo n'obe, mbilite n'ọnwụ na ịrịgo n'eluigwe na Jerusalem.
s.pa_h: Site na Antiọk ruo na nsọtụ ụwa — Rom
s.pa_lead: Site na Pentikọst na Jerusalem, otú oziọma si gbasaa karịa Judia — gabiga Eshia Nta na Yurop ruo n'obi alaeze ukwu ahụ. Họrọ otu n'ime njem ise (nke mbụ·nke abụọ·nke atọ + njem ụgbọ mmiri gaa Rom + mgbe a tọhapụrụ ya) ma soro ihe omume nke Ọrụ na akwụkwọ ozi e dere n'ụzọ.
s.foot: Isi mmalite · Ebe ndị dị na-eso ederede Akwụkwọ Nsọ na ọdịdị ala Akwụkwọ Nsọ a na-anabata (ya na aha ọgbara ọhụrụ ebe ọ baara uru). E sere ọnụ mmiri, osimiri na ọdọ mmiri site na data ọdịdị ala mepere emepe (Natural Earth), bụ nke e mere ka ọ dị mfe.
s.contact: Ajụjụ · nzaghachi — Zitere anyị ozi

eden.name: Iden (Okike · Ọdịda)
eden.note: N'ime ụwa e kere “mara mma nke ukwuu,” mmehie batara ma bee njikọ dị n'etiti Chineke na mmadụ.
events: Okike n'ụbọchị isii — “ọ dị mma nke ukwuu”
E kere mmadụ n'oyiyi Chineke
Ọdịda ahụ, na ịchụpụ ha n'Iden
Nkwa oziọma mbụ — “nkpuru nke nwanyị ga-agwepịa isi agwọ ahụ”

noah.name: Ararat (Uju Mmiri ahụ)
noah.today: Ugwu Ararat, ọwụwa anyanwụ Tọki taa
noah.note: Chineke na-ekpe ụwa jupụtara na mmehie ikpe, ma na-echekwa ndụ site n'otu ezinụlọ.
events: Ụwa jupụtara na mmebi
Uju mmiri ahụ, na ụgbọ mmiri Noa
Ọgbụgba ndụ eke na egwurugwu — “ọ dịghịkwa uju mmiri ga-ala ụwa n'iyi ọzọ”

babel.name: Ụlọ Elu Babel
babel.note: Megide mpako nke na-aga ịrute eluigwe, Chineke gbasasịrị okwu ha na ndị mmadụ n'elu ụwa.
events: “Ka anyị wuo obodo na ụlọ elu… ka anyị meere onwe anyị aha”
Chineke gbagwojuru asụsụ ha
Ndị mmadụ gbasasịrị n'elu ụwa (Shaịna — Babilọn n'oge ikpeazụ)

ur.name: Ua
ur.note: Akụkọ mgbapụta nke Akwụkwọ Nsọ na-amalite site n'ọkpọ oku otu nwoke.
events: Chineke kpọpụtara Ebram n’Ua nke ndị Kaldea
“M ga-eme gị ka ị ghọọ mba ukwu… a ga-agọzi mmadụ niile site na gị”
Site n'okwukwe ọ hapụrụ ala nna ya

haran.name: Haran
haran.note: N'ụzọ, na-aza ọkpọ oku ahụ na-eche ihu n'ala nkwa ahụ.
events: Ezinụlọ Tera biri na Haran
Tera nwụrụ
Ebram pụrụ gaa Kenan mgbe ọ dị afọ iri asaa na ise

shechem.name: Shekem · Kenan
shechem.note: N'ala nkwa ahụ ka e hiwere ezinụlọ ma ọgbụgba ndụ na-agbada n'ọgbọ ruo n'ọgbọ.
events: Ịbanye Kenan, ebe ịchụ àjà mbụ — “Mkpụrụ gị ka m ga-enye ala a”
Ọgbụgba ndụ ahụ (Jen 15) · Aịzik · Jekọb
Ụmụ nwoke Jekọb iri na abụọ — mgbọrọgwụ ebo iri na abụọ

egypt.name: Ijipt (Goshen)
egypt.note: Otu ezinụlọ ghọrọ mba ukwu — mgbe ahụ mba ndị ohu.
events: Josef, onye e rere, rịgoro n'ọchịchị Ijipt
Ezinụlọ Jekọb niile gbadara ịgbanahụ ụnwụ
Mba Izrel na-eto eto ghọrọ ndị ohu

sinai.name: Ugwu Sainai
sinai.note: Mgbapụta kachasị ukwuu nke Agba Ochie — ndị ohu ghọrọ ndị nke Chineke.
events: Ihe otiti iri na nwa atụrụ Ememe Ngabịga
Oké Osimiri Uhie kewara ha gafee
Iwu Iri, Iwu ahụ, ụlọ ikwuu na àjà

kadesh.name: Kadesh (ọzara)
kadesh.note: Ekweghị ekwe mere ka otu ọgbọ tụfuo ala ahụ — ma Chineke nọnyeere ha.
events: Ndị nledo iri na abụọ — ma ndị mmadụ jụrụ ịtụkwasị obi
Afọ iri atọ na asatọ n'ọzara — mánà, ígwé ojii na ọkụ
N'elu mbara ala Moab, ozi ikpeazụ Mosis (Diuterọnọmi)

jericho.name: Jeriko
jericho.note: N'ikpeazụ ha banyere ma weghara ala nkwa ahụ.
events: Jọdan kewara ma ndị mmadụ gafee
Mgbidi Jeriko dara ada
Imeri Kenan na nkewa ala ahụ

shiloh.name: Shaịlo (Ndị Ikpe)
shiloh.note: Mgbe enweghị eze, onye ọ bụla na-eme ihe masịrị ya — a chọrọ ezigbo eze.
events: E mara ụlọ ikwuu na Shaịlo
Usoro nke mmehie–mmegbu–mgbapụta (Debọra, Gịdiọn, Samsọn)
Rut — ikwesị ntụkwasị obi n'ụbọchị ọchịchịrị, n'agbụrụ Devid

jerusalem.name: Jerusalem · Alaeze Dị n'Otu
jerusalem.note: Oge ọlaedo Izrel — na nkwa nke eze ga-adịgide ruo mgbe ebighị ebi.
events: Sọl bụ eze mbụ, mgbe ahụ Devid na Golaịat
Ọgbụgba ndụ Devid — “ocheeze gị ruo mgbe ebighị ebi” (2 Sam 7)
Solomọn wuru ụlọnsọ ukwu na Jerusalem

samaria.name: Sameria · Alaeze Kewara Ekewa
samaria.note: Alaeze ahụ kewara ma na-arịda ka ndị amụma na-eti mkpu.
events: Mgbe Solomọn gasịrị, nkewa n'ụzọ Juda na Izrel
Ofufe arụsị na-emeghachi
Ịlaija, Aịzaịa, Jeremaịa na-eti ‘lọtanu’ — ma na-ebu amụma Mesaịa

nineveh.name: Ninive (Asiria)
nineveh.note: N'ileghara ịdọ aka ná ntị ọ bụla anya, alaeze ugwu daara n'ụzọ mbụ.
events: Ninive, isiobodo Asiria
Alaeze ugwu daara n'aka Asiria (722 TK)
E zigara Jona na Ninive

babylon.name: Babilọn
babylon.note: Abalị kachasị gbaa ọchịchịrị — ma nkwa mweghachi ka dịgide.
events: Jerusalem daara, e rechapụ ụlọnsọ ukwu (586 TK)
A dọkpụrụ Juda gaa Babilọn
Daniel na Ezikiel — okwukwe na ọhụụ n'ije mba ọzọ

susa.name: Susa (Pẹịsia)
susa.note: Ọbụna n'obi alaeze ndị na-ekpere arụsị, Chineke na-echekwa ndị ya.
events: Pẹịsia kwaturu Babilọn
Esta zọpụtara ndị Juu site na mkpochapụ
Nehemaịa kpere ekpere n'ihu eze ma e zipụ ya

return.name: Mlọghachi na Jerusalem
return.note: Ha laghachiri ma wugharịa — ma ọ dịghị eze bịara. Ha na-echere Mesaịa.
events: Mlọghachi ugboro atọ site n'iwu Saịrọs (Zerubabel 538 · Ezra 458 · Nehemaịa 444)
E wugharịrị ụlọnsọ ukwu ma weghachi mgbidi Jerusalem
Malakaị — Agba Ochie mechiri: “M ga-eziga onye ozi m”

bethlehem.name: Betlehem
bethlehem.note: Mesaịa a kwere na nkwa bịara n'obodo Devid — Okwu ahụ ghọrọ anụ ahụ.
events: A mụrụ ya na Betlehem, obodo Devid
Ndị mmụọ ozi gwara ndị ọzụzụ atụrụ ozi ahụ
Ndị amamihe bịara ife ya

nazareth.name: Nazaret
nazareth.note: Chineke toro dị ka mmadụ n'obodo nkịtị.
events: A zụlitere ya n'ụlọ ọkwa nkà
Mgbe ọ dị afọ iri na abụọ, na-ajụ na-azakwa ajụjụ n'ụlọnsọ ukwu
E mesịrị jụ ya n'ụlọ nzukọ obodo ya

jordan.name: Osimiri Jọdan
jordan.note: Ozi ọha ya na-amalite — eluigwe na-akara ya akara dị ka Ọkpara ahụ.
events: Jọn mere ya baptism
Mmụọ Nsọ rịdatara dị ka nduru — “Nke a bụ Ọkpara m m hụrụ n'anya”
Meriri ọnwụnwa atọ nke Setan n'ọzara

cana.name: Kena
cana.note: N'ihe ịrịbama mbụ ya, ọ na-egosipụta ebube ya.
events: Onye ọbịa n'agbamakwụkwọ
E mere ka mmiri ghọọ mmanya — ihe ịrịbama mbụ ya
Ndị na-eso ụzọ ya kwere na ya

sychar.name: Saịka (Sameria)
sychar.note: Ụzọ ozi mbụ — gabiga Jerusalem ruo na Sameria a na-eleda anya.
events: Ọ na-asachapụ ụlọnsọ ukwu na Jerusalem
N'abalị, Nikodimọs — “a ghaghị ịmụ gị ọzọ”
Mmiri ndụ nye otu nwanyị Sameria

capernaum.name: Kapanaum
capernaum.note: Ebe ozi Galili — ọkpọ oku, nkuzi na mmegide niile na-ezukọ ebe a.
events: Ọ na-akpọ ndị ọkụ azụ ma mee ebe a ebe obibi ya
Ozizi n'Ugwu — “Ngọzi na-adịrị ndị dara ogbenye n'ime mmụọ”
Ilu nke alaeze — na mmegide na-arịwanye elu

galilee.name: Oké Osimiri Galili
galilee.note: Site n'ike n'ebe okike, ọ na-egosi onye ọ bụ.
events: “Dere jii, kwụsị” — ọ na-eme ka oké ifufe dajụọ
O ji ogbe achịcha ise na azụ abụọ zụọ puku mmadụ ise
Ọ na-aga ije n'elu mmiri

caesarea_p.name: Sizaria Filipaị
caesarea_p.note: Ndị na-eso ụzọ ya ghọtara na ọ bụ Kraịst, ụzọ obe na-emeghe.
events: Nkwupụta Pita — “Ị bụ Kraịst, Ọkpara Chineke dị ndụ”
Ọ na-ebu ụzọ buo amụma ọnwụ ya na mbilite n'ọnwụ
E gbanwere ọdịdị ya n'ebube n'elu ugwu

jericho.name: Jeriko
jericho.note: N'ụzọ na-arịgo na Jerusalem, ọ na-achọ ndị furu efu.
events: Ọ na-eme ka Batimeọs onye ìsì hụ ụzọ
Ọ na-akpọ Zakias onye ọna ụtụ
“Nwa nke Mmadụ bịara ịchọ na ịzọpụta ndị furu efu”

bethany.name: Betani
bethany.note: Ọ na-egosi ọchịchị n'elu ọnwụ n'ọnụ ọnụ izu ikpeazụ ya.
events: Ọ na-akpọlite Lazarọs n'ili — “Mụ onwe m bụ mbilite n'ọnwụ na ndụ”
Meri tere ya mmanụ maka olili ya
Ihe ịrịbama a na-eme ka atụmatụ igbu ya sie ike

jerusalem.name: Jerusalem
jerusalem.note: Mmezu kachasị elu nke Akwụkwọ Nsọ niile na-atụ aka na ya — obe, mbilite n'ọnwụ, ịrịgo n'eluigwe.
events: Ịbanye n'ọṅụ; ọ na-akwatugharị tebụl ụlọnsọ ukwu ọzọ
N'Oriri Ikpeazụ ọ na-asapụ ụkwụ ndị na-eso ụzọ ya
Ọ nwụrụ n'elu obe
Ọ bilitere n'ọnwụ n'ụbọchị nke atọ, mgbe ahụ rịgoro n'eluigwe

antioch.name: Antiọk
antioch.note: Nzukọ na-eziga ebe ozi ndị Jentaịl na-amalite ma na-alọghachi.
events: N'ekpere Mmụọ Nsọ na-ekewapụ Banabas na Sọl
Nzukọ ebe a kpọrọ ndị kwere ekwe ‘ndị Kraịst’ na mbụ
Ebe mmalite nke njem nke mbụ, nke abụọ na nke atọ

seleucia.name: Selusia
seleucia.note: Ọdụ ụgbọ mmiri Antiọk — ha banyere ụgbọ gaa Saịprọs.

salamis.name: Salamis (Saịprọs)
salamis.note: Ebe mbụ ha kwụsịrị na Saịprọs — na-ekwusa n'ụlọ nzukọ.

paphos.name: Pafọs
paphos.note: E gosiri ike megide ndị na-emegide oziọma.
events: Elimas onye mgba afa kpụrụ ìsì
Sajiọs Pọlọs onye ọchịchị kwere ekwe
Site ebe a ‘Pọl’ na-eduga

perga.name: Pega
perga.note: Ọdụ ụgbọ na Pamfilia — ebe a Jọn Mak laghachiri azụ.

pantioch.name: Antiọk nke Pisidia
pantioch.note: Oziọma na-emeghe gawa n'ebe ndị Jentaịl nọ.
events: Ozi ogologo nke akụkọ nzọpụta n'ụlọ nzukọ
Ọtụtụ ndị Jentaịl na-aṅụrị ma nabata okwu ahụ
A chụpụrụ ha site na mmegide

iconium.name: Aịkọniọm
iconium.note: Ọtụtụ kwere ekwe, ma mkpagbu chụpụrụ ha n'ihu.

lystra.name: Listra
lystra.note: A na-akpọ ya chi, mgbe ahụ tụgburu ya nkume.
events: Ọ na-agwọ nwoke ngwụrọ site n'ọmụmụ
Igwe mmadụ na-achọ ịchụrụ ha àjà dị ka chi
A tụgburu ya nkume hapụ ya ka ọ nwụọ, ma o biliri

derbe.name: Debe
derbe.note: A na-eme ọtụtụ ndị na-eso ụzọ; ha na-alaghachi ime ka nzukọ sie ike.

troas.name: Troas
troas.note: Ebe ntụgharị ebe oziọma na-ebu ụzọ chee ihu na Yurop.
events: Ọhụụ nke otu nwoke Masedonia
“Bịa na Masedonia nyere anyị aka”
Ha gafere ozugbo banye na Yurop

philippi.name: Filipaị
philippi.note: Nzukọ mbụ Yurop — oziọma na-emeri ọbụna n'ụlọ mkpọrọ.
events: Lidia, onye na-ere akwa odo odo, kwere ekwe
A tọhapụrụ otu nwa agbọghọ ohu na-agba afa
Abụ etiti abalị, ala ọma jijiji, ezinụlọ onye nche mkpọrọ zọpụtara

thess.name: Tesalonaịka
thess.note: Okwu ahụ na-ama obodo jijiji ma mmegide na-agbawapụ.
events: Ọ na-arụrịta ụka n'ụlọ nzukọ ụbọchị izu ike atọ
“Ndị a kpaliri ụwa niile”
Ha si n'abalị pụọ nwayọọ

berea.name: Beria
berea.note: Ndị ‘mara mma’ ndị nyochara okwu ahụ n'onwe ha.
events: Ha ji obi ụtọ nabata okwu ahụ
Kwa ụbọchị ha na-enyocha Akwụkwọ Nsọ ịlele ya
Ọtụtụ na-abịa kwere ekwe

athens.name: Atens
athens.note: N'obodo ndị ọkà ihe ọmụma ọ na-ekwusa ‘chi a na-amaghị’.
events: Obodo jupụtara n'arụsị kpasuru ya iwe
N'Areopagọs ọ na-ekwusa Onye Okike na mbilite n'ọnwụ
A na-akwa ya emo, ma ụfọdụ kwere ekwe

corinth.name: Kọrint
corinth.note: Ọ nọrọ otu afọ na ọkara, na-akụ nzukọ n'obodo omume rụrụ arụ.
events: Ya na Akwila na Prisila na-akpa ụlọ ikwuu
“Atụla egwu… n'ihi na mụ na gị nọ”
Ọtụtụ ndị Kọrint kwere ekwe ma e mee ha baptism

ephesus.name: Efesọs
ephesus.note: Obi njem nke atọ — okwu ahụ na-agbasa n'Eshia niile.
events: Nkuzi kwa ụbọchị afọ abụọ n'ụlọ ọgbakọ Tiranọs
A na-akpọ akwụkwọ anwansi ọkụ; ọrụ dị ike
Demetriọs onye ọkpụ ọlaọcha na-ebute ọgba aghara

miletus.name: Miletọs
miletus.note: Nkenda site n'anya mmiri nye ndị okenye Efesọs.
events: “Lekọtanụ nzukọ ọ jiri ọbara nke aka ya zụta”
Ndị okenye na-ebe akwa, ebe ha maara na ha agaghị ahụ ya ọzọ

caesarea.name: Sizaria
caesarea.note: Afọ abụọ ọ na-agbachitere oziọma n'ihu ndị gọvanọ na otu eze.
events: Ikpe n'ihu ndị gọvanọ Filiks na Festọs
Nkwuchitara ya n'ihu Eze Agripa
“Ana m arịọ Siza” — gawa Rom

jerusalem.name: Jerusalem
jerusalem.note: A jidere ya n'ụlọnsọ ukwu, ụzọ ya dị ka onye mkpọrọ na-amalite.
events: Igwe mmadụ jidere ya n'ụlọnsọ ukwu
Ọ na-agbachitere onwe ya n'ihu kansụl ahụ
Dị ka nwa amaala Rom, e zigara ya n'okpuru nche na Sizaria

myra.name: Maịra
myra.note: Ha banyere ụgbọ mmiri Aleksandria na-aga Rom.

fairhaven.name: Ọdụ Mara Mma (Krit)
fairhaven.note: A jụrụ ịdọ aka ná ntị Pọl ka a kwụsị ịgba ụgbọ mmiri.

crete.name: Krit
crete.note: Mgbe a tọhapụrụ ya, agwaetiti ebe ọ hapụrụ Taịtọs idozi nzukọ.
events: Ọ hapụrụ Taịtọs ka ọ họpụta ndị okenye n'obodo ọ bụla
Ọ na-akpọ maka ndị ndu na-enweghị ịta ụta, ndị kwesị ntụkwasị obi
Ọ na-ede akwụkwọ ozi nye Taịtọs

malta.name: Malta
malta.note: Site n'oké ifufe na ịla ụgbọ mmiri n'iyi, nkwa Chineke na-edigide.
events: Ifufe ‘ugwu ọwụwa anyanwụ’ mebiri ụgbọ, ma mmadụ 276 niile lanarịrị
Agwọ tara ya, ma ọ dịghị emerụ ya ahụ
Ọ na-agwọ ndị ọrịa nke agwaetiti ahụ

syracuse.name: Saịrakus
syracuse.note: Ha nọrọ ụbọchị atọ na Sicily.

puteoli.name: Puteoli
puteoli.note: Ha rutere n'Itali ma ụmụnna kwere ekwe zutere ha.

rome.name: Rom
rome.note: Oziọma rutere n'obi alaeze ukwu ahụ n'ikpeazụ — ọ bụghị njedebe kama ọ bụ mmalite.
events: Afọ abụọ n'ụlọ mkpọrọ, na-ekwusa alaeze na-atụghị egwu
Site ebe a ọ na-ede Akwụkwọ Ozi Mkpọrọ (Efe·Fil·Kọl·Filemọn)
E mesịa tụọ ya mkpọrọ ọzọ, ọ na-ede 2 Timoti ma e gburu ya — “Alụwo m ezigbo agha, agbachaala m ọsọ ahụ”

journeys.j5: Njem nke ise · mgbe a tọhapụrụ ya
